case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR''S OFFICE VS. TODD LAWRENCE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-30-2018 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH, SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER. DEFENDANT TODD LAWRENCE DID NOT APPEAR. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM ANDREA MCGARY, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, TODD $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,046.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, TODD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 46.00 SERVED JUN-19-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, TODD
